notes: See also registry/entity/uk/gov/ncsc.json for the agency itself.

match_nodes.description: Guidelines for Secure AI System Development

data.official_name: Guidelines for Secure AI System Development
data.notes: Co-authored with CISA and ~20 international partner agencies, published November 2023. Lifecycle guidance (secure design, development, deployment, operation and maintenance) for AI/ML systems.
14 principles for evaluating cloud service security. Long-standing UK government cloud-assurance framework, analogous in scope to CSA's CCM.

match_nodes.description: Cyber Essentials / Cyber Essentials Plus certification scheme

data.notes: UK government-backed certification scheme, originally launched by the Department for Business, Innovation & Skills (now DSIT), technically administered by the IASME Consortium as accreditation body. Self-assessment (Cyber Essentials) or externally-audited (Cyber Essentials Plus) baseline technical controls (boundary firewalls, secure configuration, access control, malware protection, patch management), required for many UK government contracts.
